title: Tofu Skewers with Mushy Pea Salsa
description: A tasty and healthy Norwegian-inspired dish, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner. The combination of marinated tofu and mushy pea salsa is a game changer!
instructions: 1. Cut the tofu into bite-sized pieces and place in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Pour the marinade over the tofu and mix well.
4. Thread the marinated tofu onto skewers.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until the tofu is golden brown.
6. Meanwhile, heat a pan over medium heat.
7. Add the mushy peas, red onion, and red bell pepper to the pan.
8. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5-7 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
9. Serve the grilled tofu skewers with the mushy pea salsa.
10. Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
